author: Siliconera
text:
Naruto Card Game TCG Trailer Appears Ahead of Gen Con 2026
A Naruto Card Game TCG is on the way, with a debut at Gen Con 2026 and card giveaway at a Yankees game.

author: Siliconera
text:
Granblue Fantasy Relink: Endless Ragnarok Demo Debuts
There's a new Granblue Fantasy Relink: Endless Ragnarok demo on all platforms appearing alongside character unlock details.

author: Siliconera
text:
My Hero Academia: All’s Justice Getting Switch 2 Port
My Hero Academia: All's Justice will be on the Switch 2, following the two Switch My Hero One's Justice releases.

author: Siliconera
text:
Genshin Impact Luna VIII Adds Sandrone and the Frost Moon
The Genshin Impact Luna VIII Special Program teased Sandrone, the Frost Moon area, a Fontaine event, and Snezhnaya.

author: Siliconera
text:
Pokemon Pokopia Gets a Jirachi Event Next Week
A Pokemon Pokopia Jirachi event starts next week and brings a new furniture set that looks perfect for a starry bedroom.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Cardcaptor Sakura Mobile Game Appears Next Week
Players will be able to collect miniatures of Sakura with various outfits in this decorative game.

author: Siliconera
text:
GTA VI Cover Art Appears Ahead of Pre-orders
We now know how the GTA VI cover art appears ahead of the pre-orders for the game opening later this month.

author: Siliconera
text:
Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition Switch 2 Edition Is a Nice Bonus
Xenoblade Chronicles Definitive Edition on Switch 2 feels like a valuable update, but you get more out of it if you haven't played in a while.

author: Siliconera
text:
Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave Theodora Will Use Gambits
It looks like Gambits won't be for everyone anymore.

author: Siliconera
text:
Sonic the Hedgehog Woobles Kits Let You Crochet Amigurumi Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles
The Woobles' next video game amigurumi crochet kits are based on Sonic the Hedgehog and include Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles.

author: Siliconera
text:
Mega Man and Onimusha Will Be Playable at Gamescom 2026
Capcom will have 4 games at Gamescom 2026 booth, and Mega Man: Dual Override and Onimusha: Way of the Sword will be there.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Palworld Pals Toys and Blind Boxes Arrive in August
Palworld articulated Pal toys and sets of small blind box Mystery Egg figures are both on the way this summer.

author: Siliconera
text:
Gust Working on Atelier Yumia Switch 2 FPS Issues
Atelier Yumia Switch 2 Edition launched with fps and performance issues, but Gust is aware and working on a fix.

author: Siliconera
text:
Ghost in the Shell Anime Heading to Amazon Prime
The new The Ghost in the Shell anime adaptation will be streaming on Amazon Prime worldwide once it launches next month.
